We move fast, we care about what ships, and we work closely with the founders we support.</strong></p><p>
</p><p><strong>We have an urgent project kicking off and need someone who can hit the ground running.</strong></p><p>
</p><p><strong>The role:</strong><span class="e0384c81"> </span>Full stack development on an active product — Angular on the front, Node.js on the back. 1-year contract, starting immediately.</p><p>
</p><p><strong>What we need:</strong></p><ul class="_374f71de _73c02ef9"><li>3+ years with Angular and Node.js in production</li><li>Startup experience — you're used to moving fast and figuring things
